style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, in two panels. LEFT panel labelled DELEGATED ACCESS: a box labelled AGENT GATEWAY with small input lines labelled EMAIL, CALENDAR, ERP, SERVICENOW, SHAREPOINT feeding into it, and a small note IAM beneath. RIGHT panel labelled VIBE-CODE TO PRODUCTION: a box labelled BUILD passes rightward through three gates labelled RED + BLUE, INFO MGMT, IDENTITY, into a final box labelled PRODUCTION. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, in two panels. LEFT panel labelled DELEGATED ACCESS: a box labelled AGENT GATEWAY with small input lines labelled EMAIL, CALENDAR, ERP, SERVICENOW, SHAREPOINT feeding into it, and a small note IAM beneath. RIGHT panel labelled VIBE-CODE TO PRODUCTION: a box labelled BUILD passes rightward through three gates labelled RED + BLUE, INFO MGMT, IDENTITY, into a final box labelled PRODUCTION. The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
